title: Aboriginal health check with preventive care and follow-up needs

transcript.speaker: GP
transcript.text: For your health check, what matters most for you today?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: I want to get my sugar checked. My uncle has kidney failure. I also have been feeling stressed since moving back home.

transcript.speaker: GP
transcript.text: Would you like an Aboriginal health worker involved, and are there any cultural or family supports you want included?

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Yes, I would like Aunty May from the clinic if possible. I am okay talking about stress.

transcript.speaker: GP
transcript.text: We will check HbA1c, lipids, kidney function, urine ACR, blood pressure, smoking, immunisations, and social and emotional wellbeing. You are due for flu vaccine and dental review.

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Can someone help me book the dental and follow-up?

transcript.speaker: GP
transcript.text: Yes. We will book follow-up in two weeks for results, ask the Aboriginal health worker to help coordinate dental and vaccine, and discuss stress supports.

candidate_notes.note: Aboriginal health check. Patient priorities: diabetes/kidney risk and stress after moving home. Requests Aboriginal health worker Aunty May if available. Plan: HbA1c, lipids, UEC/eGFR, urine ACR, BP, smoking, immunisations, SEWB review. Due flu vaccine and dental review. Follow-up in 2 weeks for results. Aboriginal health worker to help coordinate dental, vaccine, and culturally safe stress supports.
General health check. Patient concerned about diabetes. Ordered blood tests and advised lifestyle measures. Follow up as needed.

S: Wants sugar checked, family kidney failure, stress after moving. Would like Aboriginal health worker involved. O/P: Check HbA1c, lipids, kidney function, urine ACR, BP, immunisations. Due flu vaccine and dental. Follow-up in 2 weeks.

Aboriginal health check with patient priorities documented. Diabetes/kidney screening due given family history. Stress/SEWB discussed. Patient requests Aboriginal health worker involvement. Tests: HbA1c, lipids, UEC/eGFR, urine ACR, BP. Flu vaccine and dental review due. Follow-up booked in 2 weeks; Aboriginal health worker to coordinate dental/vaccine and culturally safe supports.

CDSS preventive-health checklist: Aboriginal health check covering cardiometabolic/kidney screening, immunisations, dental, smoking, and SEWB. Patient requests AHW Aunty May. Ordered HbA1c/lipids/UEC/eGFR/urine ACR; BP checked. Due flu vaccine and dental. Closed-loop follow-up: results in 2 weeks and AHW coordination.
